steps.t: Bothin has not appeared. You should talk to Elta and come up with a different plan together.
Elta has asked you to find Bothin alone. You should venture into the cave Skrizagáf, on the eastern side of Shataz-kordh.
You should continue looking for signs of Bothin in Skrizagáf.
You have found a dead Orc in Skrizagáf. You should examine the corpse.
You should pretend to steal the Orc corpse and trick Bothin into emerging.
You have defeated Bothin and obtained its hide. Elta waits for you outside of Shataz-kordh.
